_publications._publicationTitle: Exploring transcriptional regulators Ref-1 and STAT3 as therapeutic targets in malignant peripheral nerve sheath tumours.

_contextSnippet: Inhibition of Ref-1 redox activity significantly reduced MPNST cell proliferation in vitro...APX3330 demonstrated activation of apoptosis via PARP cleavage (89 kD) with a dose of 60 μM in NF90-8
details: Significantly reduced MPNST cell proliferation in vitro and demonstrated activation of apoptosis via PARP cleavage (89 kD) with a dose of 60 μM in NF90-8
